name: skbotmessager
description: Disparo em massa de SMS e WhatsApp a partir de uma planilha de contatos

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix server
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n server,web,electron -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix web" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron electron/main.js"
scripts.electron:start: npm run build --prefix web && electron electron/main.js
